ERTWorld Cinema - Spider-Man: Μακριά από τον Τόπο του
Sniper: G.R.I.T.
programme.desc: Action Thriller. When an international terrorist cult threatens global political stability, Brandon Beckett travels to Malta to infiltrate the cult and take out its leader. (Ryan Robbins, Chad Michael Collins) 2023, 88'

programme.title: The List
programme.desc: Comedy. Abby is about to get married and everything is perfect. Until she finds out her fiance slept with a celebrity. So, what's more natural than her paying him back the exact same way? (Geoff Pierson, Halston Sage) 2023, 93'

programme.title: The Resurrection of Charles Manson
programme.desc: Horror. A young couple creates an audition tape for a Charles Manson film. However, the dark events of the audition material slip into reality and the couple find themselves intertwined in a sinister plot. (Katherine Hughes, Will Peltz) 2023, 75'

programme.title: Female Company
programme.desc: Comedy. Apart from the card games and the hairdresser's shop, a provincial apartment also hosts the... illegal and limitless passionate affairs of four married yet neglected women! (Maria Georgiadou, Smaragda Diamantidou) 1999, 104'

programme.title: Cine News
programme.desc: TV Magazine. Be informed on all that happens in the exciting field of the seventh art exclusively on Novacinema channels! New releases, successful productions, famous stars and directors march on your screen...

programme.title: Minamata
programme.desc: Drama. In the '70s, photojournalist Eugene Smith travels to Japan to document and make globally known the neurological disease that ravage the citizens of a coastal town. (Johnny Depp, Bill Nighy) 2020, 111'

programme.title: Charlie's Angels: Full Throttle
programme.desc: Action - Comedy. The 'Angels' are back in action, seeking the person who invaded a database that contains valuable information about the new identities of every person in the FBI's Witness Protection Program... (Drew Barrymore, Demi Moore) 2003, 102'

programme.title: Cine News
programme.desc: TV Magazine. Be informed on all that happens in the exciting field of the seventh art exclusively on Novacinema channels! New releases, successful productions, famous stars and directors march on your screen...

programme.title: We Grown Now
programme.desc: Drama. Two childhood friends navigate life in Chicago's public housing, finding joy and resilience amid challenges. Their bond deepens as they face the reality of growing up and the dreams they hold. (Tyla Abercrumbie, Dan Flanner) 2023, 90'

programme.title: Ruby Gillman Teenage Kraken
programme.desc: Animation. Disobeying her mother's strict rule, shy 16-year-old Ruby goes to the beach, where she discovers that she's heir to the throne of the warrior Krakens! (Voices: Leto Ampatzi, Tania Paleologou) 2023, 88'

programme.title: Out of Africa
programme.desc: Romance. 1914. In wild Kenya, Baroness Blixen feels neglected by her husband, until love comes into her life... Sidney Pollack earned the Academy Award for Best Direction and the film won 6 more Oscars. (Meryl Streep, Robert Redford) 1985, 155'

programme.title: Films & Stars
programme.desc: Special. Enjoy this year's Hollywood highlights, full of special moments from great protagonists that stood out, awards, top box office movies and exclusive interviews by the stars during the glamorous premieres.

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Animation - Family. While looking for the biggest and most evil... Villain to become their next master, three Minions set off on a global road trip, only to end up in the hands of wicked Scarlet Overkill! (Voices: Danai Kalahora, Christos Thanos) 2015, 88'

programme.title: Stella in Love
programme.desc: Romance. A teenage girl in 1980s Paris explores love and self-discovery amid the vibrant nightlife and cultural changes. Her encounters and friendships shape her journey, bringing both joy and heartbreak. (Marina Fois, Benjamin Biolay) 2022, 106'

programme.title: Freelance
programme.desc: Action - Comedy. A former special forces operative takes on a freelance security job protecting a journalist. When a routine assignment goes awry, they must navigate a dangerous jungle and uncover a deadly conspiracy. (Christian Slater, John Cena) 2023, 104'

programme.title: Shortcomings
programme.desc: Romance - Comedy. Ben, a struggling filmmaker, lives with his girlfriend, who works for a local film festival. When she moves to New York for an internship, he begins to explore what he thinks he might want. (Timothy Simons, Tavi Gevinson) 2023, 89'

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 1
programme.desc: Adventure. Katniss becomes the symbol of rebellion against the Capitol, while struggling with personal loss and the weight of leadership. She leads a revolution that could change the fate of Panem forever. (Jennifer Lawrence, Julianne Moore) 2014, 123'

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 1
programme.desc: Adventure. Katniss becomes the symbol of rebellion against the Capitol, while struggling with personal loss and the weight of leadership. She leads a revolution that could change the fate of Panem forever. (Jennifer Lawrence, Julianne Moore) 2014, 123'

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 1
programme.desc: Adventure. Katniss becomes the symbol of rebellion against the Capitol, while struggling with personal loss and the weight of leadership. She leads a revolution that could change the fate of Panem forever. (Jennifer Lawrence, Julianne Moore) 2014, 123'

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 1
programme.desc: Adventure. Katniss becomes the symbol of rebellion against the Capitol, while struggling with personal loss and the weight of leadership. She leads a revolution that could change the fate of Panem forever. (Jennifer Lawrence, Julianne Moore) 2014, 123'

programme.title: Corsage
programme.desc: True Story. In 1877, Sissy celebrates her 40th birthday. As First Lady of Austria, she is not allowed to express herself and must remain the beautiful young empress. These conventions, however, suffocate her... (Vicky Krieps, Jeanne Werner) 2022, 110'

programme.title: Corsage
programme.desc: True Story. In 1877, Sissy celebrates her 40th birthday. As First Lady of Austria, she is not allowed to express herself and must remain the beautiful young empress. These conventions, however, suffocate her... (Vicky Krieps, Jeanne Werner) 2022, 110'

programme.title: Eighth Grade
programme.desc: Comedy - Drama. An introverted girl is trying to deal with the difficulties that come with puberty and survive the last week of the last -and disastrous as it proved- year before she begins high school. (Elsie Fisher, Josh Hamilton) 2018, 91'

programme.title: Eighth Grade
programme.desc: Comedy - Drama. An introverted girl is trying to deal with the difficulties that come with puberty and survive the last week of the last -and disastrous as it proved- year before she begins high school. (Elsie Fisher, Josh Hamilton) 2018, 91'

programme.title: Just Broke Up
programme.desc: Comedy. Petros breaks up with Electra with a message on her answering machine, on her birthday! Instead of her, the message has been received by her friends who do their best to hide the truth! (Zeta Makripoulia, Yannis Tsimitselis) 2008, 90'

programme.title: Just Broke Up
programme.desc: Comedy. Petros breaks up with Electra with a message on her answering machine, on her birthday! Instead of her, the message has been received by her friends who do their best to hide the truth! (Zeta Makripoulia, Yannis Tsimitselis) 2008, 90'

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Animation. After being bitten by a radioactive spider, teen Miles gains some super powers and Peter Parker takes on his training in order to protect his city. The movie earned an Academy Award. (Voices: Fivos Rimenas, Dionysis Makris) 2018, 113'

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Animation. After being bitten by a radioactive spider, teen Miles gains some super powers and Peter Parker takes on his training in order to protect his city. The movie earned an Academy Award. (Voices: Fivos Rimenas, Dionysis Makris) 2018, 113'

programme.title: Reality
programme.desc: Drama. A young intelligence specialist is interrogated by the FBI over a classified leak. As the pressure mounts, the line between truth and lies blurs, revealing the harsh reality of whistleblowing. (Sydney Sweeney, Josh Hamilton) 2023, 79'

programme.title: Reality
programme.desc: Drama. A young intelligence specialist is interrogated by the FBI over a classified leak. As the pressure mounts, the line between truth and lies blurs, revealing the harsh reality of whistleblowing. (Sydney Sweeney, Josh Hamilton) 2023, 79'

programme.title: Blueback
programme.desc: Family - Drama. A young girl forms a deep bond with a wild blue groper while diving. As she grows up, she fights to protect the ocean and its creatures from environmental threats. (Mia Wasikowska, Eric Bana) 2022, 102'

programme.title: Blueback
programme.desc: Family - Drama. A young girl forms a deep bond with a wild blue groper while diving. As she grows up, she fights to protect the ocean and its creatures from environmental threats. (Mia Wasikowska, Eric Bana) 2022, 102'

programme.title: Action Zone
programme.desc: Magazino. A magazine strictly for men! Get all the information about the latest action movies, watch interviews by the protagonists and enjoy breathtaking scenes, unique gadgets, fast cars and much more!

programme.desc: Magazino. A magazine strictly for men! Get all the information about the latest action movies, watch interviews by the protagonists and enjoy breathtaking scenes, unique gadgets, fast cars and much more!

programme.title: Micki & Maude
programme.desc: Romance - Comedy. Rob finds himself between two women: his beloved wife and his young mistress! To his bad luck, though, they both get pregnant and go into labor at the same time and place... (Dudley Moore, Ann Reinking) 1984, 113'

programme.title: Micki & Maude
programme.desc: Romance - Comedy. Rob finds himself between two women: his beloved wife and his young mistress! To his bad luck, though, they both get pregnant and go into labor at the same time and place... (Dudley Moore, Ann Reinking) 1984, 113'

programme.title: All that Jazz
programme.desc: Musical. Director-choreographer Joe Gideon loves perfection in life and art but he has a very negative look at his life and feels a victim of women and reality. The movie won 4 Academy Awards. (Roy Scheider, Jessica Lange) 1979, 123'

programme.title: OSS 117: From Africa with Love
programme.desc: Action - Comedy. OSS 117 is sent to Africa, on a mission to protect a president under attack from rebels. This time, however, he has to work with a young and promising agent. (Jean Dujardin, Pierre Niney) 2021, 111'

programme.title: OSS 117: From Africa with Love
programme.desc: Action - Comedy. OSS 117 is sent to Africa, on a mission to protect a president under attack from rebels. This time, however, he has to work with a young and promising agent. (Jean Dujardin, Pierre Niney) 2021, 111'

programme.title: The Bourne Identity
programme.desc: Action. After a failed mission assigned to him by the Secret Services, Jason loses his memory. In an attempt to find it again, he becomes the target of dangerous assassins... (Matt Damon, Clive Owen) 2002, 114'

programme.title: The Bourne Identity
programme.desc: Action. After a failed mission assigned to him by the Secret Services, Jason loses his memory. In an attempt to find it again, he becomes the target of dangerous assassins... (Matt Damon, Clive Owen) 2002, 114'

programme.title: Of Money and Blood
programme.desc: Season 1 marathon - Episode 12. Attias and his friend are held captive. Simon's team arrives to rescue him but he isn't fooled. Simon tracks Attias, who has become a fugitive, down in Manila, and finally manages to arrest him.

programme.title: Of Money and Blood
programme.desc: Season 1 marathon - Episode 12. Attias and his friend are held captive. Simon's team arrives to rescue him but he isn't fooled. Simon tracks Attias, who has become a fugitive, down in Manila, and finally manages to arrest him.

programme.title: The Brigade
programme.desc: Crime - Thriller Series, Ep.5. Tensions rise as the Perez-El Hassani conflict escalates after Eric's children kidnap the El Hassani nephew. The brothers give Said three days to find him or face war. The B.R.I. raids Rayan's hideout but fails to capture him.

programme.title: The Brigade
programme.desc: Crime - Thriller Series, Ep.5. Tensions rise as the Perez-El Hassani conflict escalates after Eric's children kidnap the El Hassani nephew. The brothers give Said three days to find him or face war. The B.R.I. raids Rayan's hideout but fails to capture him.

programme.title: Insomnia
programme.desc: Season 1 marathon - Episode 4. Robert shows Phoebe the footage of Emma, which triggers a panic attack as it reminds her of something that happened to her as a child. Determined to avoid sleeping, Emma opts to give Caroline legal advice.

programme.title: Insomnia
programme.desc: Season 1 marathon - Episode 4. Robert shows Phoebe the footage of Emma, which triggers a panic attack as it reminds her of something that happened to her as a child. Determined to avoid sleeping, Emma opts to give Caroline legal advice.

programme.title: Insomnia
programme.desc: Season 1 marathon - Episode 5. After being interrogated by the police, Emma is released on insufficient evidence. Desperate to understand what's going on with her sister, Phoebe goes to see Caroline who she nearly recognizes from her past.

programme.title: Insomnia
programme.desc: Season 1 marathon - Episode 5. After being interrogated by the police, Emma is released on insufficient evidence. Desperate to understand what's going on with her sister, Phoebe goes to see Caroline who she nearly recognizes from her past.

programme.title: Insomnia
programme.desc: Season 1 marathon - Episode 6. Season finale. When Phoebe wakes, she tells Emma about Caroline's connection to their childhood. With rising dread, Emma races home only to discover Caroline has sedated her family and is armed with a knife.

programme.title: Insomnia
programme.desc: Season 1 marathon - Episode 6. Season finale. When Phoebe wakes, she tells Emma about Caroline's connection to their childhood. With rising dread, Emma races home only to discover Caroline has sedated her family and is armed with a knife.

programme.desc: Novacinema4: The series channel offering the best tv series very close to their broadcast in the US. Awarded European Series on Mondays, daily series strips and weekend all day marathons.

programme.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding 2
programme.desc: Romance - Comedy. Ten years have passed since Toula's and Ian's big, fat Greek wedding, and their daughter is suffocating under the family's pressure. At the same time, a family secret brings chaos to the loud family! (Nia Vardalos, John Corbett) 2016, 90'

programme.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding 2

programme.title: Conviction
programme.desc: Drama Series, Ep.3. Rudy emerges from his coma and Roxane questions him about the identity of 'Max', who has been blurred out of all photos related to the case.

programme.title: Conviction
programme.desc: Drama Series, Ep.3. Rudy emerges from his coma and Roxane questions him about the identity of 'Max', who has been blurred out of all photos related to the case.

programme.title: High Country
programme.desc: Crime - Mystery Series, Ep.8. Season finale. Andie identifies the mastermind behind the mirders and vanishings that have rocked the high country, only to realise Helen and Kirra are now in danger.

programme.title: Mr. Loverman
programme.desc: Drama Series, Ep.2. Barry wobbles when he considers the impact of divorce on his favourite daughter.

programme.title: A Very Royal Scandal
programme.desc: Drama Series, Ep.1. Season opening. Prince Andrew attempts to declare his innocence as he finds himself at the centre of an international scandal that not only threatens his own position, but the British monarchy itself.

programme.title: A Very Royal Scandal
programme.desc: Drama Series, Ep.2. Various obstacles stand in the way of the interview going ahead. After much anticipation, Emily Maitlis's infamous interview with Prince Andrew commences. But the meeting takes various twists and turns no one could have expected.

programme.title: A Very Royal Scandal
programme.desc: Drama Series, Ep.2. Various obstacles stand in the way of the interview going ahead. After much anticipation, Emily Maitlis's infamous interview with Prince Andrew commences. But the meeting takes various twists and turns no one could have expected.

programme.title: The Killing Kind
programme.desc: Mystery - Thriller Series, Ep.3. Ingrid hides away, determined to work out what is happening but when her ex-fianc? turns up can she trust him? Ingrid visits a former colleague, to help her investigation, but events take an unexpected turn.

programme.title: The Killing Kind
programme.desc: Mystery - Thriller Series, Ep.3. Ingrid hides away, determined to work out what is happening but when her ex-fianc? turns up can she trust him? Ingrid visits a former colleague, to help her investigation, but events take an unexpected turn.

programme.title: When Love Springs
programme.desc: Romance - Comedy. When she arrives at a quaint B&B for her parents' vow renewal, Rory runs into a former flame that broke her heart. Panicked and afraid of humiliation, she pretends the B&B owner is her new boyfriend. (Rhiannon Fish, Erin Connor) 2023, 83'

programme.desc: Romance - Comedy. When she arrives at a quaint B&B for her parents' vow renewal, Rory runs into a former flame that broke her heart. Panicked and afraid of humiliation, she pretends the B&B owner is her new boyfriend. (Rhiannon Fish, Erin Connor) 2023, 83'

programme.title: Taxi Driver
programme.desc: Crime - Drama. Facing the corruption of society in dark Manhattan, a mentally unstable taxi driver will try to take matters into his own hands... The film was nominated for four Oscars and two Golden Globes. (Robert De Niro, Jodie Foster) 1976, 110'

programme.title: Knights of the Zodiac
programme.desc: Adventure. While on the streets looking for cash and his abducted sister, Seiya taps into a mysterious magic world, where he must protect a reincarnated goddess. (Sean Bean, Famke Janssen) 2023, 108'

programme.title: Knights of the Zodiac
programme.desc: Adventure. While on the streets looking for cash and his abducted sister, Seiya taps into a mysterious magic world, where he must protect a reincarnated goddess. (Sean Bean, Famke Janssen) 2023, 108'

programme.title: Knights of the Zodiac
programme.desc: Adventure. While on the streets looking for cash and his abducted sister, Seiya taps into a mysterious magic world, where he must protect a reincarnated goddess. (Sean Bean, Famke Janssen) 2023, 108'

programme.title: Knights of the Zodiac
programme.desc: Adventure. While on the streets looking for cash and his abducted sister, Seiya taps into a mysterious magic world, where he must protect a reincarnated goddess. (Sean Bean, Famke Janssen) 2023, 108'

programme.title: Fashion House
programme.desc: Documentary Series - Ep. 2, Versace. Behind bold clothes and the luxury, Fashion House reveals how a humble boy from a poor part of Southern Italy would beat all the odds to take on the fashion elite and make history.

programme.title: Passengers
programme.desc: SciFi - Romance. A spacecraft, a global threat, 5000 passengers and a 120-year voyage to a distant colony planet. But, what will happen when two of them are awakened 90 years early? (Jennifer Lawrence, Chris Pratt) 2016, 112'

programme.title: The Son
programme.desc: Social. A lawyer's hectic life changes when his ex wife shows up and asks for his help regarding their teenage son, who, for months, has been troubled, distant and angry. (Hugh Jackman, Vanessa Kirby) 2022, 117'

programme.title: Sweeter than Chocolate
programme.desc: Romance - Comedy. Claiming a promotion, a TV reporter reluctantly accepts to investigate a chocolate shop that sells a kind of chocolate that's supposed to help people find true love. (Dan Jeannotte, Brenda Strong) 2023, 82'

programme.title: Lara's Choice II
programme.desc: Drama - Romance Series, Ep.55. Nela leaves Split with Cvitka, taking Simun's money. Ana abandons Jakov despite her love. Zlaja seeks Lara, but Dinko finds him. Ana, forced into marriage, confesses her love for Jakov to Lola and Nena.

programme.title: Fourth Down and Love
programme.desc: Romance. A single mom reconnects with her high school crush, now a former football star, when their kids join the same team. As they bond over the sport, sparks fly, and old feelings resurface. (Ryan Paevey, Pascale Hutton) 2023, 84'

programme.title: Fashion House
programme.desc: Documentary Series - Ep. 3, Burberry. Burberry is the story of one of the most extraordinary transformations in fashion history. Thirty years ago, it was an ailing rainwear manufacturer, today it is a multi-billion pound fashion house on a par with the likes of Dior and Gucci.

programme.title: Lara's Choice II
programme.desc: Drama - Romance Series, Ep.56. Nena reveals Ana is a duchess to Jakov, who feels betrayed. Dorian hides Lara's letter but faces Leila's suspicions. Zlaja reunites with Lara, reviving her spirits. Lara decides to return to Split with Zlaja and Dinko.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Talk Show - Season 11. Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon presents a unique show with interesting interviews from favourite celebrities, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches, giving the audience a nice and relaxing evening!

programme.title: Celebrity Scoop
programme.desc: Magazine. Gain exclusive access into the lives of your favorite stars and learn their secrets with the help of a special magazine that guides you around the glamorous world of show business and brings you the hottest news!

programme.title: America's Got Talent: Fantasy Team
programme.desc: Talent show - Episode 3. This new season of the famous American show welcomes some of the best acts to ever grace from all over the world, only, this time, fans will be given the voting power right from the start! Terry Crews hosts the show.

programme.title: Birth of a Champion
programme.desc: True Story. Germany, 1984. A coach sees the talent of hotheaded teenage tennis player Boris Becker. With his help, Boris will become the youngest male player to ever win the Wimbledon! (Bruno Alexander, Samuel Finzi) 2021, 100'

programme.title: Birth of a Champion
programme.desc: True Story. Germany, 1984. A coach sees the talent of hotheaded teenage tennis player Boris Becker. With his help, Boris will become the youngest male player to ever win the Wimbledon! (Bruno Alexander, Samuel Finzi) 2021, 100'

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Talk Show - Season 12. Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon presents a unique show with interesting interviews from favourite celebrities, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches, giving the audience a nice and relaxing evening!

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Talk Show - Season 12. Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon presents a unique show with interesting interviews from favourite celebrities, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches, giving the audience a nice and relaxing evening!

programme.title: America's Got Talent 19
programme.desc: Talent Show - Episode 20. On one of the most famous shows of America, people of all ages talents present their talent to the most intriguing panel of judges, hoping to win the million-dollar grand prize. Terry Crews hosts the show.

programme.title: Cyprus - France
programme.desc: FIBA EuroBasket 2025 Qualifiers. The FIBA EuroBasket 2025 qualifiers continue with the second window and are contested by 32 teams, including the co-hosts Cyprus, Finland, Poland and Latvia, drawn into eight groups of four teams each.

programme.desc: A documentary series from the journalists of Novasports! The legend of Olympiacos and Greek basketball remembers all the way from his talent being disputed to his winning shot in Istanbul and the triumph.

programme.desc: Bundesliga. The German top football division, the Bundesliga, is one of the most spectacular leagues in Europe and is marked by dynamic teams, high scores and intense, competitive battles! Enjoy all the games of the Bundesliga on Novasports!

programme.title: Bayern Munich - Barcelona
programme.desc: EuroLeague 2024/25. Another exciting match of the EuroLeague, the European-wide top basketball club competition, comes on your screens! The European powerhouses try their best in their effort to claim a place in the Final Four and win the coveted trophy.

programme.desc: Tennis: Davis Cup 2024, Semi-final 1. The Final 8, the knock-out stage of the Davis Cup, is held in Malaga on November 19th-24th. The best eight national teams of this year's edition are going head to head contesting the champions' title.

Again with you at 12:00
programme.desc: The channel brings you a wide selection of exciting competitions from the world of sports focusing on the WTA and Davis Cup tennis tournaments that offer the tennis fans unforgettable moments of live action!

programme.title: Again with you at 12:00
programme.desc: The channel brings you a wide selection of exciting competitions from the world of sports focusing on the WTA and Davis Cup tennis tournaments that offer the tennis fans unforgettable moments of live action!

programme.title: Golf: The Masters Tournament
programme.desc: Day 4, Georgia/USA. Watch the first major golf tournament of the season, the exciting The Masters, that is always hosted by Augusta National Golf Club, Georgia. This season's, 88th edition takes place on April 11-14.

programme.title: Tennis: WTA Finals 2024
programme.desc: Doubles Final. You are watching the matches of the final, great women tennis tournament of the season, the WTA Finals, held from November 2nd-9th in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.

programme.title: Tennis: WTA Finals 2024
programme.desc: Single Final. You are watching the matches of the final, great women tennis tournament of the season, the WTA Finals, held from November 2nd-9th in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.

programme.title: Tennis: WTA 1000 2024
programme.desc: Cincinnati, Final. You are watching the matches of the Cincinnati Open, a WTA 1000 tennis tournament held on August 13th-19th in Cincinnati, USA.

programme.title: Moments from the World of Sports
programme.desc: Spectacular sports action with football and basketball across Europe! Live matches from every top European football league, as well as basketball games from the EuroLeague and the EuroCup!

programme.title: Moments from the World of Sports
programme.desc: Spectacular sports action with football and basketball across Europe! Live matches from every top European football league, as well as basketball games from the EuroLeague and the EuroCup!

programme.title: Again with you at 10:00
programme.desc: Spectacular sports action with football and basketball across Europe! Live matches from every top European football league, as well as basketball games from the EuroLeague and the EuroCup!

programme.title: Besiktas - Bahcesehir
programme.desc: EuroCup 2024/25. Follow the games of the EuroCup 2024/25, another competitive edition in the competition's history. Among the 20 participating teams there are some of the greatest clubs of European basketball.

programme.title: Karlsruher - Jahn Regensburg
programme.desc: Bundesliga 2. You are watching matches of the Bundesliga 2, the second division of German football. 18 clubs take part in the competition, while St. Pauli won the champions' title last season.

programme.title: Bundesliga
programme.desc: 2024/25 Mid-Season Review. The Novasports channels take us to the German football grounds to enjoy action from the Bundesliga, one of the world's top football championships. Take a look back at the most important moments of the first half of the 2024/25 season.
